seoTitle: How to Use Gumroad to Sell Digital Products & Ebooks
metaDescription: A complete walkthrough for listing digital products on Gumroad, from creating your listing to uploading files and sharing your purchase link.
intro: Gumroad is built for creators who want to sell digital goods without setting up a full ecommerce site, and that includes ebooks, PDFs, and other downloadable products. This guide covers the whole process, from creating your product listing to uploading the files buyers will receive.

steps.heading: Create a digital product listing
steps.body: Start a new product and select the digital product option so Gumroad sets up the right listing type.

steps.heading: Write your product description
steps.body: Explain clearly what the product includes and why it's worth buying, since this drives conversions.

steps.heading: Add cover images
steps.body: Upload a cover and thumbnail so your listing looks polished across the platform.

steps.heading: Upload your deliverable files
steps.body: Attach the actual PDF, ebook, or asset files customers will download after purchase.

steps.heading: Set pricing and publish
steps.body: Choose fixed or flexible pricing, then publish your listing and share the link.

faq.question: What file types can I sell on Gumroad?
faq.answer: Gumroad supports PDFs, ebooks, and other common digital file formats for direct download.

faq.question: Can I sell multiple files as one product?
faq.answer: Yes, you can attach several files to a single product listing if they belong together.

faq.question: How do buyers get their files after checkout?
faq.answer: They're taken to a receipt page with instant download access, and a copy is also emailed to them.

faq.question: Can I offer pay-what-you-want pricing on digital products?
faq.answer: Yes, Gumroad supports flexible pricing options alongside standard fixed pricing.
